title: Assistant Store Manager - Zara India - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Zara India - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Zara India! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Varanasi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Zara India:
Zara India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zara India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
